summary: FEAT-002 Unified Change Request System - All backend tests PASSED (14/14). Frontend integration verified. Change request lifecycle (create, respond, resolve, close) working correctly via API. Dashboard Control Tower shows change request counts. Quote detail page shows change request alert banner for documents with 'Change Requested' status.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend change_request_service.py: Well-structured canonical SSOT with full lifecycle support
Backend routes/change_requests.py: Clean thin layer over service with proper auth guards
Backend stats.py: Correctly includes open_change_requests count from canonical system
Frontend ChangeRequestPanel.js: Properly fetches from /api/change-requests/entity/{type}/{id} with auth headers
Frontend AgentInvoiceDetail.js: ChangeRequestPanel integrated in sidebar + change request alert banner
Frontend AgentQuoteDetail.js: ChangeRequestPanel integrated in sidebar + change request alert banner

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, change request features verified)

seed_data_creation: Used existing demo seed data. Created test change request during backend testing (cleaned up via lifecycle test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: FEAT-002 Change Request System fully tested. Backend API lifecycle (create/respond/resolve/close) working. Frontend shows change request alert banner on quote/invoice detail pages when document has 'Change Requested' status. ChangeRequestPanel component integrated but only shows when canonical change_requests exist for the entity. Dashboard Control Tower shows '1 Change Requests' action card.

features_verified: Control Tower with change request count
Change request alert banner on quote detail

backend_endpoints.POST /api/change-requests: PASSED - Creates change request with correct shape
backend_endpoints.GET /api/change-requests: PASSED - Lists change requests for agent
backend_endpoints.GET /api/change-requests/entity/{type}/{: PASSED - Returns change requests for entity
backend_endpoints.POST /api/change-requests/{id}/respond: PASSED - Adds message, sets status to under_review
backend_endpoints.POST /api/change-requests/{id}/resolve: PASSED - Marks as resolved, adds resolution note

frontend_components.ChangeRequestPanel: Integrated in invoice and quote detail pages sidebar
frontend_components.Change Request Alert Banner: Shows on quote detail when status is 'Change Requested'
frontend_components.Control Tower: Shows change request count in action cards
